name: Stuffed Grape Leaves W/Egg-Lemon Sauce Pt. 1
recipeIngredient: 1 Egg-Lemon Sauce (see recipe below for instructions and ingredients)
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Egg-Lemon Sauce (see recipe below).
2. Remove any large stems and leaves from the grape leaves.
3. Place a small spoonful of filling in the center of each leaf.
4. Fold the sides of the grape leaf over the filling, then fold the bottom to completely enclose it.
5. Arrange the stuffed grape leaves in a greased baking dish.
6. Pour the Egg-Lemon Sauce over the top and gently stir to coat.
Egg-Lemon Sauce:
1. In a medium bowl, whisk together the eggs and salt until well combined.
2. Slowly pour in the sherry vinegar while continuing to whisk.
3. Mix until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
4. Pour the sauce over the stuffed grape leaves and serve.
Note: The Egg-Lemon Sauce recipe is included in this collection.
